title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Senior Teacher in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!
